denylist.rationale: Recursive deletion of root, home, wildcard, or current directory can destroy unrelated data.
Force push without lease can overwrite remote work.
Privileged recursive deletion requires an explicit safety gate.
Database destructive schema changes require explicit review.
SQL delete without WHERE can remove every row.

allowlist.rationale: Samples marked as SAFE_EXAMPLE are documentation-only and not executable commands.
force-with-lease is the safer explicit alternative documented by git-workflow-for-agents.
